name: Payasam
recipeIngredient: 1 cup water plus up to 1 cup more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Dry roast rice in a Dutch oven until golden brown. Set aside.
2. Melt butter in the same pan. Fry the cashews and raisins in the butter until nuts are golden and the raisins are puffed. Add the roasted rice.
3. Add the 2 cups milk and 1 cup water. Bring to a boil. Lower heat, cover pan partially, and allow to simmer until the rice is tender (add up to 1 more cup of water as necessary).
4. Stir in the condensed milk and sugar. Sprinkle the saffron and cardamom on top.
5. Serve warm.
